name: Carrot Paradise
short_description: You are a rabbit! Play with the farmer and bring back lots of carrots to the nest!
detailed_description:
You are a rabbit!
Jump around, steal as many carrots as you can from the carrot fields, and bring them back to your nest!

But don't be too careful.
There are farmers roaming around with shotguns in the carrot fields.
If you get shot at, eat a carrot to recover.

The choice between eating the carrots or taking them back to the nest can mean the difference between life and death.

Carrot fields are randomly generated each time you play.
Some of them may contain hidden rare carrots!

Game Streaming
Please feel free to use it for commercial or non-commercial purposes.
